channel.title: shirts on Tyler Burleigh
channel.description: Recent content in shirts on Tyler Burleigh

item.title: Predicting t-shirt size from height and weight
item.description: Today I was given a task that sounded so straight-forward: What t-shirt size would you send to someone if you don’t know their shirt size, but instead you know their height, weight, and gender? It was so straight-forward that I was sure there must be prior art out there that I could re-use. A StackOverflow, a mathematical formula, a GitHub repo, a blog post – there had to be something!
